column6:
Like CCC1 but with Prox-Filter. 

The City has been buying readers for years, and is finally reading to start replacing prox cards with dual-tech Prox + LEAF cards. They will be updating readers from CCC1 to CCC2 to leverage the security of the Prox-Filter. They still have peripheral devices that need to read prox, so they can't go to straight single-tech LEAF.
